nasb.text: Then Moses said to Aaron and to his sons, “Boil the flesh at the doorway of the tent of meeting, and eat it there together with the bread which is in the basket of the ordination offering, just as I commanded, saying, ‘Aaron and his sons shall eat it.’

esv.text: And Moses said to Aaron and his sons, “Boil the flesh at the entrance of the tent of meeting, and there eat it and the bread that is in the basket of ordination offerings, as I commanded, saying, ‘Aaron and his sons shall eat it.’

cnv.text: 摩西對亞倫和他的兒子說：“你們要在會幕門口煮祭肉，也在那裡吃祭肉和承受聖職祭籃子裡的餅，照著我的吩咐，亞倫和他的兒子要吃這些。

ccb.text: 摩西对亚伦父子们说：“你们要照我的指示在会幕门口煮祭肉吃，也要吃篮子里为授圣职而献的饼。
